name: tote
description: Racing accounting platform — immutable, always-balanced ledger.

scripts.test:integration: pnpm db:up && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://tote:tote@localhost:55432/tote?schema=public pnpm --filter @tote/db exec prisma migrate deploy && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://tote:tote@localhost:55432/tote?schema=public pnpm --filter @tote/db test
